name: Dandelion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and prepare the dandelion leaves as you would lettuce. Roll them in a clean cloth and pat dry.
2. Place the dandelion leaves in a salad bowl and keep warm.
3. Cut the bacon into small pieces and fry until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a skillet, melt butter and cream over low heat.
5. Beat eggs, add salt, pepper, sugar, and vinegar to the melted butter mixture. Stir well.
6. Gradually pour the egg mixture into the skillet with the warm cream mixture. Increase heat slightly and stir until the dressing thickens like custard.
7. Remove from heat and pour the hot dressing over the dandelion leaves. Gently stir to combine.
8. Serve immediately. Do not use dandelions that have begun to flower, as they can become bitter.
